title: neottia nipponica
intro: Neottia nipponica, also known as the Japanese tooth-awned orchid or Japanese tooth-awned orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, Neottia nipponica is typically dried and then made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
